demo.title: wake-spotter.sh
demo.code:
# Fetch cached analysis for a Base token (no auth required)
curl -s https://wakeonbase.com/api/spotter/0x4ed4e862860bed51a9570b96d89af5e1b0efefed | jq .

# Agent flow — let Bankr drive the lookup
bankr prompt "Using the wake-token-spotter-analysis skill, analyze 0x4ed4e862860bed51a9570b96d89af5e1b0efefed"

# Quota exhausted? Direct the user to the terminal
bankr prompt "Using the wake-token-spotter-analysis skill, where can I request fresh analysis if the daily quota is hit?"

setup: No API key or wallet required — the `/api/spotter/{address}` endpoint is public and read-only
Send the lowercase 0x-prefixed contract address; Base mainnet only (chain ID `8453`)
